creator: jcfyecrayz@liamekaens.com
text:
Here is where the new webcolors version requirement comes from:

/wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/py-jsonschema/work-py311/jsonschema-4.23.0/pyproject.toml:  "webcolors>=24.6.0",


webcolors was updated on Aug 21:
